_doc: Each variant defines the prompts/params sent to ControlNet Scribble. Edit these and re-run eval.mjs to compare results.

storybook.blip_question: What is in this picture? Name only the subject, no style or medium words.
storybook.llm_enrichment: A child drew "{{caption}}". Write a vivid image prompt (under 25 words): the subject in a whimsical storybook scene with a complementary colorful background. Style: watercolor children's book illustration. Only output the prompt.
storybook.a_prompt: children's book illustration, watercolor, soft lighting, whimsical, colorful, detailed, charming, storybook art style
storybook.n_prompt: photo, realistic, 3d render, dark, scary, violent, ugly, blurry, lowres, bad anatomy, bad hands, extra fingers, cropped, worst quality, low quality, monochrome

calm_subject.description: Calm background, subject stands out clearly
calm_subject.blip_question: What are the main objects in this drawing? Answer with the nouns/objects/animals/monsters.
calm_subject.llm_enrichment: A child drew "{{caption}}". Write a short image generation prompt (under 30 words) that describes this subject with a fitting calm background that makes the subject stand out clearly. Specify children's picture book illustration. No filler words. Only output the prompt, nothing else.
calm_subject.a_prompt: best quality, subject clearly distinct from background
calm_subject.n_prompt: longbody, lowres, bad anatomy, bad hands, missing fingers, extra digit, fewer digits, cropped, worst quality, low quality, subject blending into background

gouache_folk.description: Gouache folk art — bold shapes, earthy palette
gouache_folk.blip_question: What is in this picture? Name only the subject, no style or medium words.
gouache_folk.llm_enrichment: A child drew "{{caption}}". Write an image prompt (under 25 words): the subject as a bold folk art piece with flat gouache colors and a simple patterned background. Only output the prompt.
gouache_folk.a_prompt: folk art, gouache painting, bold shapes, flat colors, earthy palette, decorative, hand-painted, matte finish
gouache_folk.n_prompt: photo, realistic, 3d render, glossy, gradient, blurry, lowres, bad anatomy, worst quality, low quality, monochrome

soft_pastel.description: Soft pastel crayons — dreamy and textured
soft_pastel.blip_question: What is in this picture? Name only the subject, no style or medium words.
soft_pastel.llm_enrichment: A child drew "{{caption}}". Write an image prompt (under 25 words): the subject rendered in soft pastel crayons with a gentle gradient background. Style: dreamy pastel illustration for children. Only output the prompt.
soft_pastel.a_prompt: pastel crayon illustration, soft texture, dreamy, gentle colors, children's art, warm tones, hand-drawn feel
soft_pastel.n_prompt: photo, realistic, 3d render, sharp edges, dark, scary, violent, blurry, lowres, bad anatomy, worst quality, low quality, neon colors

papercut.description: Paper cut-out collage style — layered and tactile
papercut.blip_question: What is in this picture? Name only the subject, no style or medium words.
papercut.llm_enrichment: A child drew "{{caption}}". Write an image prompt (under 25 words): the subject as a colorful paper cut-out collage with layered paper textures and a contrasting background. Only output the prompt.
papercut.a_prompt: paper cut-out art, collage, layered paper, colorful, tactile, craft, children's illustration, textured
papercut.n_prompt: photo, realistic, 3d render, smooth, digital, blurry, lowres, bad anatomy, worst quality, low quality, monochrome, flat

anime_chibi.description: Cute anime/chibi style — big eyes, bright colors
anime_chibi.blip_question: What is in this picture? Name only the subject, no style or medium words.
anime_chibi.llm_enrichment: A child drew "{{caption}}". Write an image prompt (under 25 words): the subject in cute chibi anime style with big expressive eyes and a colorful simple background. Only output the prompt.
anime_chibi.a_prompt: chibi, anime style, cute, big eyes, bright colors, clean lines, kawaii, colorful, detailed
anime_chibi.n_prompt: photo, realistic, dark, scary, violent, ugly, blurry, lowres, bad anatomy, bad hands, worst quality, low quality, monochrome, mature
